greeting.line: Here I am. The worst of it. Fight me, run from me, or take my hand.
greeting.line_friendly: Take my hand. Integration hurts less than pretending.
greeting.line_hostile: Fight me or run. Don't stand there pretending I'm not yours.

lore.line: I'm every night you didn't cope and every word you regret. You built me out of what you buried. Integration hurts less than another decade of pretending I'm not yours.
